name: Dr. Ratio
desc: Member of the Intelligentsia Guild.\nEccentric temperament, sharp-tongued but with an elegant demeanor.\nThe face under the strange alabaster head sculpture is apparently unexpectedly handsome.

1.name: Pride Comes Before a Fall
1.desc: The maximum stackable count for the Trace "Summation" increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>. When a battle begins, immediately obtains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> stacks of Summation. Needs to unlock Summation first.

2.name: The Divine Is in the Details
2.desc: When his Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> hits a target, for every <u>debuff</u> the target has, deals Imaginary <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Dr. Ratio's ATK. This effect can be triggered for a maximum of <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s) during each <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

10000010.name: Debuff
10000010.desc: All status effects that provide negative combat debuffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

3.name: Know Thyself
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Ignorance Is Blight
4.desc: When triggering the Talent, additionally regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy for Dr. Ratio.

5.name: Sic Itur Ad Astra
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Vincit Omnia Veritas
6.desc: Additionally increases the trigger count for "Wiseman's Folly" by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>. The DMG dealt by the Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

130501.name: Mind is Might
130501.desc: Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Dr. Ratio's ATK to one designated enemy target.
130501.simple_desc: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to one designated enemy target.

130502.name: Intellectual Midwifery
130502.desc: Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Dr. Ratio's ATK to one designated enemy target.
130502.simple_desc: Deals Imaginary DMG to one designated enemy.

130503.name: Syllogistic Paradox
130503.desc: Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Dr. Ratio's ATK to one designated enemy target and applies "Wiseman's Folly." When Dr. Ratio's teammates attack a target afflicted with "Wiseman's Folly," Dr. Ratio launches 1 instance of his Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> against this target.\n"Wiseman's Folly" can be triggered for up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> times and only affects the most recent target of Dr. Ratio's Ultimate. This trigger count resets after Dr. Ratio's Ultimate is used.
130503.simple_desc: Deals Imaginary DMG to one designated enemy target and applies "Wiseman's Folly." When Dr. Ratio's teammates attack a target afflicted with "Wiseman's Folly," Dr. Ratio launches 1 instance of <color=#f29e38ff><u>Follow-Up ATK</u></color> on this target.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

130504.name: Cogito, Ergo Sum
130504.desc: When using his Skill, Dr. Ratio has a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>fixed chance</u> of launching a <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> against his target for 1 time, dealing Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Dr. Ratio's ATK. For each debuff the target enemy has, the <u>fixed chance</u> of launching <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> increases by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>. If the target enemy is defeated before the <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> triggers, the <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> will be directed at a single random enemy instead.
130504.simple_desc: When using Skill, there is a chance to launch 1 instance of <color=#f29e38ff><u>Follow-Up ATK</u></color> on the target, dealing Imaginary DMG.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

30000002.name: Fixed Chance
30000002.desc: Fixed chance will not be affected by any factor.

130506.name: Attack
130506.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

130507.name: Mold of Idolatry
130507.desc: After using Technique, creates a Special Dimension that Taunts nearby enemies, lasting for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> second(s). After entering battle with enemies in this Special Dimension, there is a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to reduce each single enemy target's SPD by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s). Only 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.
130507.simple_desc: Creates a Special Dimension. Enemies within the dimension are Taunted. After entering battle with enemies in this dimension, there is a high chance to <color=#f29e38ff>reduce SPD</color> of enemy targets.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1.point_desc: When Dr. Ratio uses his Skill, for every <u>debuff</u> on the target, his CRIT Rate increases by <unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak> and CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. This effect can stack up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> time(s).

10000010.name: Debuff
10000010.desc: All status effects that provide negative combat debuffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

1.point_desc: When Skill is used to attack an enemy target, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to reduce the attacked enemy target's Effect RES by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1.point_desc: When dealing DMG to a target that has <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> or more debuff(s), for each <u>debuff</u> the target has, the DMG dealt by Dr. Ratio to this target increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, up to a maximum increase of <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>.

10000010.name: Debuff
10000010.desc: All status effects that provide negative combat debuffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.
